calibration_prompt:
User: I keep getting tired in the afternoon even though I sleep eight hours a night. What could be wrong?
Assistant: There are several common culprits behind afternoon fatigue even with adequate sleep. Let me walk you through them. First, sleep quality matters more than duration — untreated sleep apnea, frequent awakenings, or irregular bed times can leave you feeling unrested. Second, blood sugar swings after a high-carb lunch are a classic post-lunch slump trigger. Third, dehydration, iron deficiency, and thyroid issues all commonly present as persistent tiredness. Would you like to talk through which of these seems most likely given your routine?
